description: Benchmark VHH sequences with published or estimated Tm values for validating stability predictions. Placeholder entries are included as examples — users should replace or extend with their own experimentally characterised VHHs. Sources: NbThermo database (https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gkab1021) and published literature.

schema.name: Short identifier for the VHH
schema.experimental_tm: Melting temperature in °C (DSF, DSC, or nanoDSF)
